label: Title
description: Person's title or honorific. Maps from: Title, Salutation, Honorific, Mr/Mrs/Ms

label: First Name
description: Person's first/given name. Maps from: First Name, Forename, Name (when split)

label: Last Name
description: Person's last/family/surname. Maps from: Last Name, Surname, Family Name

label: Full Name
description: Person's full name as a single field. Only use when form clearly intends combined name, otherwise split into first_name + last_name

label: Email Address
description: Email address. Maps from: Email, E-mail, Electronic Mail, Contact Email

label: Phone Number
description: Home or general phone number. Maps from: Tel, Telephone, Phone, Home Phone, Contact Number

label: Mobile Phone
description: Mobile/cell phone number. Maps from: Cell, Cellphone, Mobile, Mobile Number

label: Date of Birth
description: Person's date of birth. Maps from: DOB, D.O.B, Birth Date, Date of Birth, Born

label: ID Number
description: National identity document number. Maps from: ID, ID No, ID Number, Identity Number, RSA ID, National ID

label: Passport Number
description: Passport document number. Maps from: Passport, Passport No, Passport Number

label: Address Line 1
description: First line of street address. Maps from: Address, Street Address, Physical Address (first line when split)

label: Address Line 2
description: Second line of street address, suburb or apartment. Maps from: Address Line 2, Suburb, Unit/Apt (second line when split)

label: City
description: City or town name. Maps from: City, Town, Municipality

label: Postal Code
description: Postal or ZIP code. Maps from: Postal Code, Post Code, ZIP, ZIP Code

label: Country
description: Country name or code. Maps from: Country, Nation, Country of Residence

label: Gender
description: Person's gender. Maps from: Gender, Sex. Typically radio with options Male/Female/Other

label: Nationality
description: Person's nationality or citizenship. Maps from: Nationality, Citizenship, Country of Birth

label: Employer Name
description: Name of employer or company. Maps from: Employer, Company, Place of Work, Organisation, Business Name

label: Job Title
description: Person's job title or role. Maps from: Position, Designation, Occupation, Job Title, Role

label: Bank Account Number
description: Bank account number. Maps from: Account No, Account Number, Bank Account

label: Bank Name
description: Name of bank. Maps from: Bank, Bank Name, Financial Institution

label: Branch Code
description: Bank branch code. Maps from: Branch Code, BSB, Sort Code

label: Signature
description: Signature field. Maps from: Signature, Sign Here, Applicant Signature
